summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Ile Ubuntu - Living Learning Commons platform. Fixed critical datetime comparison bug in middleware. All 39 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI tests pass for login, dashboard, courses, community, and navigation.

fixed.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes - session expiry check was comparing naive datetime from MongoDB with timezone-aware datetime
fixed.fix: Added timezone handling to make naive datetimes aware before comparison

critical_code_review_comments: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
RBAC is properly implemented - students cannot create courses/cohorts/archives
API responses properly exclude MongoDB _id field
Design follows midnight blue/black/gold color scheme with Ankh symbol

test_credentials.test_users_created: Test users created directly in MongoDB for API testing (admin, faculty, student roles)

seed_data_creation: Test users and sessions created in MongoDB with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API fully tested with pytest. Frontend tested with Playwright for login page, dashboard, courses page (with course creation), community page (with post creation), and navigation between all pages. The middleware datetime bug was fixed. All RBAC permissions verified working correctly.

frontend: Login page renders with Ankh symbol and Sign In button - PASSED
Dashboard loads with sidebar navigation - PASSED
All navigation links present (Dashboard, Courses, Cohorts, Community, Archives, Messages) - PASSED
Courses page loads with New Course button for faculty - PASSED
Community page loads with New Post button - PASSED
Navigation between all pages works - PASSED

rca_of_the_issue.issue: All authenticated API endpoints returning 500 Internal Server Error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In /app/backend/middleware.py, the session expiry check was comparing a timezone-naive datetime from MongoDB with a timezone-aware datetime (datetime.now(timezone.utc)). Python raises TypeError when comparing naive and aware datetimes.
reproduction_steps: 1. Create a session in MongoDB (stores naive datetime)
2. Call any authenticated endpoint with X-Session-ID header
3. Middleware tries to compare session['expires_at'] < datetime.now(timezone.utc)
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added timezone handling in middleware to check if expires_at is naive and make it aware (assume UTC) before comparison
